_comment: Demo Lab — environment matrix for Discrete Mfg CoE. Reflects current reality: Master CE Mfg + Mfg Gold Template are the active CX (D365 CE) lane. The 4 Discrete Mfg envs exist in PPAdmin but are empty — they represent the future state once content is migrated.

_matrix._note: Build in HA → review → promote to Prod → repeat. CX track is active (Master CE Mfg + Mfg Gold Template). ERP track is staged (envs exist, nothing deployed yet). The Discrete Mfg CX envs are the planned migration target for CX — currently empty.
_matrix._migration_plan: When ready: migrate Master CE Mfg → Discrete Mfg CX Primary. Mfg Gold Template → Discrete Mfg CX HA.

environments.name: Master CE Mfg
environments.purpose: Active production CX demo env — fully configured, used for live customer demos. Future: will be migrated to / superseded by Discrete Mfg CX Primary when that env is stood up.
environments.guardrails: Live demo env — snapshot before any bulk data changes. Core accounts/cases shared across demo scenarios.

environments.name: Mfg Gold Template
environments.purpose: Secondary env — currently holds ABC Supply Sales data and straggler solutions/flows that haven't been migrated to Master CE Mfg yet. Was originally the 'clean gold template baseline' but has accumulated customer-specific content. Early Release cycle — still useful for testing preview D365/Copilot features. Future: either clean back to a true baseline or repurpose as a dedicated Sales demo env.
environments.guardrails: ⚠️ NOT a clean baseline — has ABC Supply Sales data. Check before cloning. Straggler solutions need migration to Master CE Mfg.

environments.name: Discrete Mfg ERP Primary
environments.purpose: Staged ERP Production env — exists in PPAdmin, no content yet. Waiting for F&O demo content to be built out.
environments.guardrails: Empty env — safe to deploy F&O base packages
environments._todo: Add env_id + URL from PPAdmin. Then deploy base F&O Discrete Mfg demo data package.

environments.name: Discrete Mfg ERP HA
environments.purpose: Staged ERP HA env — exists in PPAdmin, no content yet. Will be the build/test lane for F&O scenarios.
environments.guardrails: Empty env — safe to experiment with F&O configurations
environments._todo: Add env_id + URL from PPAdmin. Then start building F&O demo scenarios.

environments.name: Discrete Mfg CX Primary
environments.purpose: Future CX Production env — empty shell, planned migration target from Master CE Mfg. Will replace Master CE Mfg as the primary CX demo env once stood up.
environments.guardrails: Do not use for live demos until migration from Master CE Mfg is complete
environments._todo: Add env_id + URL. Then migrate content from Master CE Mfg.

environments.name: Discrete Mfg CX HA
environments.purpose: Future CX HA env — empty shell, planned migration target from Mfg Gold Template. Will replace Gold Template as the CX dev sandbox.
environments.guardrails: Empty — safe to experiment. Migration source: Mfg Gold Template.
environments._todo: Add env_id + URL. Then migrate baseline from Mfg Gold Template.

ancillary.name: AMETEK HKP RMA
ancillary.purpose: Customer-specific demo tenant for AMETEK RMA scenario

ancillary.name: RAPP Backend
ancillary.purpose: Azure Function hosting RAPP agent endpoints

_matrix._note: Build in HA → review → promote to Prod → repeat. CX = Customer Experience (D365 CE/CRM). ERP = Finance & Operations. The 4 Discrete Mfg envs are the active matrix. Master CE Mfg and Mfg Gold Template are legacy/secondary (promoted to ancillary).

environments.name: Discrete Mfg CX Primary
environments.purpose: Production CX demo env — live customer demos for D365 CE/Customer Service scenarios. New patterns land here after validation in CX HA.
environments.guardrails: Live demo env — snapshot before any bulk data changes
environments._todo: Paste env_id and URL from PPAdmin → environment detail page

environments.name: Discrete Mfg CX HA
environments.purpose: HA / dev sandbox for CX. Validate new agents, solutions, and PCF controls here before promoting to Discrete Mfg CX Primary.
environments.guardrails: Keep clean — no customer-specific data. Test patterns, then promote to Discrete Mfg CX Primary.
environments._todo: Paste env_id and URL from PPAdmin → environment detail page

environments.name: Discrete Mfg ERP Primary
environments.purpose: Production ERP demo env — live customer demos for D365 F&O Supply Chain and Manufacturing scenarios.
environments.guardrails: Live demo env — coordinate with Bill before structural changes
environments._todo: Paste env_id and URL from PPAdmin → environment detail page

environments.name: Discrete Mfg ERP HA
environments.purpose: HA / dev sandbox for ERP. Validate new F&O configurations and data packages before promoting to Discrete Mfg ERP Primary.
environments.guardrails: Test F&O configurations here. Promote validated packages to Discrete Mfg ERP Primary.
environments._todo: Paste env_id and URL from PPAdmin → environment detail page

ancillary.name: Master CE Mfg
ancillary.purpose: Legacy primary CE demo env (Production). Still active — used for demos requiring full production data depth. Superseded in the matrix by Discrete Mfg CX Primary.

ancillary.name: Mfg Gold Template
ancillary.purpose: Legacy HA/template CE env (Early Release). Still active — clean baseline used as a source template. Superseded in the matrix by Discrete Mfg CX HA.

ancillary.name: AMETEK HKP RMA
ancillary.purpose: Customer-specific demo tenant for AMETEK RMA scenario

ancillary.name: RAPP Backend
ancillary.purpose: Azure Function hosting RAPP agent endpoints
